holdings.infoBox: SPEM is an equity ETF with a total of 3024 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.33%, Tencent Holdings at 2.86%, Alibaba Group Holding at 2.04%, MediaTek at 1.94%, and Delta Electronics at 1.31%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Emerging Markets ETF (SPEM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Emerging Markets BMI index. The fund tracks an index of emerging markets companies weighted by market cap. SPEM was launched on Mar 19, 2007 and is issued by State Street.
